case_title: PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION VS. KIMBERLY OCONNOR et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT OCONNOR, KIMBERLY DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-13-2014

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCONNOR, KIMBERLY $18,779.89 PRINCIPAL, $525.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,016.26 INTEREST, $415.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,736.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT OCONNOR, KIMBERLY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $415.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT OCONNOR, KIMBERLY
DECLARATION OF CARMEN RODRIGUEZ IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDENT CREDIT UNION
